# Helpful Home Buyers USA

> We buy houses for cash in Virginia. Fair offer in 24 hours. Close in 7 days. No repairs, no commissions, no hassle.

## About

Helpful Home Buyers USA is a local Virginia real estate investment company that purchases homes directly from homeowners for cash. We are not agents or a listing service — we are the actual buyers.

## What We Do

- Buy houses as-is in any condition across Virginia
- Provide fair cash offers within 24 hours
- Close in as little as 7 days or on the seller's preferred schedule
- Cover all closing costs — sellers pay nothing out of pocket
- Buy in any situation: foreclosure, probate/estate, divorce, tax liens, fire damage, inherited property, vacant houses, behind on payments

## Service Area

Northern Virginia (Fairfax County, Arlington, Alexandria, Loudoun County, Prince William County), Richmond metro, Hampton Roads, and surrounding Virginia communities.

## Contact

- Phone: (703) 940-1159
- Email: info@helpfulhomebuyersusa.com
- Website: https://helpfulhomebuyersusa.com
